## beehiiv subscriptions get-by-email

Find a subscription by email address

### Synopsis

Get subscription by email

Please note that this endpoint requires the email to be URL encoded. Please reference your language's documentation for the correct method of encoding. Retrieve a single subscription belonging to a specific email address in a specific publication.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/subscriptions/by_email/{email}

```
beehiiv subscriptions get-by-email <email> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv subscriptions get-by-email person@example.com
beehiiv subscriptions find person@example.com
```

### Options

```
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
